titleJa: agent architecture は model novelty よりも重要な比較軸になっていく
titleEn: Agent architecture is becoming a more important comparison axis than model novelty
summaryJa: 2026年3月1日時点では、2025年を通して積み上がった公式発表と研究ベンチマークから、protocol、SDK、runtime、evals、approval を束ねた architecture が agent 導入の主論点になっていることがより明確になっていた。
summaryEn: By March 1, 2026, the accumulated 2025 launch cycle plus the benchmark literature had made it much clearer that protocol, SDK, runtime, evals, and approvals together define the real architecture question in agent adoption.

publishedSources.label: RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
The BrowserGym Ecosystem for Web Agent Research
Microsoft Azure: Agent Factory, designing the open agentic web stack
Microsoft: Introducing multi-agent workflows in Azure AI Foundry Agent Service
Anthropic: Demystifying evals for AI agents
